channel.title: trojan on yy小站
channel.description: Recent content in trojan on yy小站

item.title: 梯子，懂的都懂不解释
item.description: 基础配置 初始化OS https://yanyong.cc/post/debian11-init/ fail2ban 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 sudo apt-get install -y fail2ban sudo tee /etc/fail2ban/jail.d/sshd.local << EOF [sshd] enabled = true port = 22 EOF sudo systemctl reload fail2ban sudo fail2ban-client reload 安装docker和nginx 略 ssl泛域名证书和cl
